tool_description: Access real-time and historical exchange rate data for over 170 world currencies — updated every 60 seconds and sourced from trusted financial data providers. ## Endpoints - **Recent Exchange Rates** — Get the latest rates for 170+ currencies in a single call - **Convert** — Convert any amount between currencies instantly - **Historical Exchange Rates** — Access exchange rate data going back years for trend analysis - **Time-Series** — Track how rates changed over any custom date range (Ultra+ plans) - **Symbols** — Get the full list of supported currency codes ## Use Cases - **E-commerce & SaaS** — Display localized pricing and process international payments - **Fintech & Banking** — Build currency conversion tools, portfolio trackers, and financial dashboards - **Travel Apps** — Show travelers real-time exchange rates and conversion - **Accounting Software** — Automate multi-currency bookkeeping and reconciliation - **Academic & Research** — Analyze forex trends with historical and time-series data ## Why Choose This API? - 170+ currencies including all major and most exotic pairs - 100% uptime — enterprise-grade reliability - Sub-250ms latency — fast enough for real-time applica…
